name: Brand24 Social Media Monitoring API
what_it_does: Brand24 REST API for real-time social media and web monitoring platform. Enables AI agents to access brand mention and keyword monitoring across social media, news, blogs, forums, and review sites, retrieve sentiment analysis and emotion detection data, access influencer identification and reach metrics, handle media analytics and share-of-voice reporting, retrieve competitor mention and coverage comparison, manage alert and notification workflows for brand crises, access discussion volume and trend analysis, retrieve source and channel breakdown analytics, manage project and keyword configuration, and integrate monitoring data with CRM, Slack, and reporting tools.
use_cases: Monitoring brand mentions and sentiment from brand reputation management agents
Accessing crisis detection and alert data from PR crisis management agents
Retrieving influencer and reach analytics from social media intelligence agents
Integrating brand monitoring with Slack and CRM from communications automation agents
not_for: Enterprise social media management without SMB-focused monitoring needs
Deep social publishing and scheduling without monitoring focus
Large enterprises requiring Brandwatch or Meltwater scale
best_when: An SMB, startup, or mid-market brand using Brand24 wants AI agents to automate brand mention monitoring, sentiment tracking, crisis alerting, influencer identification, and competitor coverage analysis.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Brand monitoring aggregates mentions of individuals and brands from third-party platforms — republication restrictions apply. Automated competitor monitoring must not infringe on their IP. Sentiment data about individuals requires careful handling for GDPR compliance.

auth.notes: Brand24 uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account and project-level credentials. API documentation available at brand24.com/api. Webhooks for new mention and alert events. REST API provides access to mention data and analytics.

pricing.notes: Warsaw, Poland. Founded 2011. Real-time social media monitoring for SMB and mid-market. 4,000+ customers in 154 countries. AI-powered sentiment analysis and topic detection. Strong in European markets. Competes with Mention and Talkwalker for affordable brand monitoring.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; mention history access throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Mention data aggregates third-party content — redistribution restrictions and GDPR for individual mention data
SMB-focused product — API capabilities are more limited than enterprise alternatives (Brandwatch, Meltwater)
No public MCP server — REST API with basic documentation
Webhook reliability for real-time monitoring — validate webhook delivery with retry logic
Data history depth varies by plan — lower tiers have limited historical data access
OAuth lacks fine-grained scopes — all-or-nothing account access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Brand monitoring and social data. GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US data residency. Third-party mention content and individual data governance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Brand monitoring data. GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US data residency. Third-party social content and individual mention data.
